title: I'm Eric Ries, author of "The Lean Startup" and new book "Incorruptible" – AMA
summary: Eric Ries, author of 'The Lean Startup,' announces his new book 'Incorruptible' and discusses how companies drift from their missions due to 'financial gravity.' He shares insights from founding the Long-Term Stock Exchange, co-founding AI lab Answer.AI, and advising companies like Anthropic. The AMA focuses on organizational structure and governance.
